title: FRAUD WATCH NETWORK - 211info
text: AARP OREGON FRAUD WATCH NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers reporting for scams via an online form and telephone, online education (webinar) and guidance about scams, peer support for those who have experienced fraud, and referrals to agencies investigating fraud. 1455 SW Broadway Suite 1490 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Helpline: Monday-Friday 5am-5pm Email (877) 907-3360 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (877) 907-3360 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Consumer Fraud Reporting Fraud Prevention Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AARP COUNSELING SETTINGS - AARP HELPLINE INFORMATION SERVICES - AARP CAREGIVING COMMUNITY RESOURCES MUTUAL SUPPORT - CONNECTING PUBLIC SAFETY - AARP DRIVER SAFETY PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX AIDE SITES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AARP OREGON
